ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer style */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount produced */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the beer was added to the inventory */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the beer */,
  "ibu" REAL /* International Bitterness Unit */,
  "og" REAL /* Original Gravity */,
  "fg" REAL /* Final Gravity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the beer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES beer_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the beer style (e.g., Ale, Lager) */,
  "color_range" TEXT /* Color range of the beer style (e.g., SRM 2-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of ingredient (e.g., hops, malt) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the ingredient */,
  "quantity_available" REAL /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the ingredient */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the ingredient (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe entry */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer associated with the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient used in the recipe */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the recipe */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being brewed */,
  "brew_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was brewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., brewing, conditioning, packaged) */,
  "batch_size" REAL /* Size of the batch (in gallons) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer in inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level (quantity at which to reorder) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity (amount to order when reordering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewer, manager, sales) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production log entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch associated with the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who logged the activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the production */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity logged (e.g., brewing, packaging, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer for which the price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the beer */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_quality_checks_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer on promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Promotional code for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fermentations" (
  "fermentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fermentation entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch being fermented */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of fermentation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of fermentation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of fermentation (in degrees Fahrenheit) */,
  "gravity_readings" TEXT /* Gravity readings during fermentation (e.g., 1.050, 1.020, 1.000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fermentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fermentations_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packaging" (
  "packaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packaging entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch being packaged */,
  "package_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was packaged */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging (e.g., bottles, cans, kegs) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of beer packaged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packaging_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)
